message:
feat(syscall): add *at wrappers and migrate access/symlink to native syscalls

Add 5 new raw syscall wrappers (symlinkat, faccessat, mkdirat, fchmodat,
fchownat) for both x86_64 and aarch64. Migrate access() and symlink()
in unistd_abi to use native syscalls instead of libc::syscall.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
